name: Mistral Mantle
description:
This thick, fur-lined cloak has the frost rune stitched on the hem in silvery blue thread. Frigid wind swirls around the cloak, regardless of the weather.
While wearing this cloak, you have resistance to cold damage. Additionally, when you move within 5 feet of a creature, you can cause the cloak's cold wind to buffet the creature. The creature must succeed on a {@dc 14} Dexterity saving throw or take {@damage 1d6} cold damage and have the prone condition. A creature can be affected by the mantl
